dataset.value_or_reason: Exact upstream training corpus has not been published for this external artifact.

code.value_or_reason: Training code is not public for this external artifact.

seed.value_or_reason: Training seed not disclosed by upstream publisher.

eval_spec.value_or_reason: We did not train this SAE; upstream eval-spec is not available. Downstream eval-spec is separately committed in later certificate stages.

counterfactuals_addressable.question: Is the external artifact identifiable by content hash?
Which training commitments are not available for this external artifact?

non_claims: Does not prove SGD ran correctly.
Does not certify the training dataset because the upstream publisher has not published it.
Does not certify the training code because it is not public.
Does not certify the training seed because it is not disclosed.
Cannot verify that the model commitment preceded any eval-spec commitment, because training timestamps are not available.
External artifact: provenance cannot be fully audited; this certificate is structural acknowledgment, not provenance certification.
